race.comment: QUEEN OF SEES (6) made an impressive return last start when a commanding winner over 1650m at Bendigo on May 20, getting home by 7 metres. Must raise the bar but she has the ability to test this field. JILLIBY RADIANCE (2) won at this track two runs ago before finishing second at her latest appearance over 1650m at Bendigo, beaten 7 metres. Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position. This looks a sterner test than last time but on her best form she is capable of a return to winning ways. MORNING DOVE (1) is worth another chance after a last-start ninth over 1650m at Bendigo a week-and-a-half ago.
